hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push.*[[:space:]/:](main|master)([[:space:]:]|$)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"main/master is production-only per AGENTS.md branch strategy. Push to a feature branch instead."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (reset --hard|push (--force|-f)|clean -fd|branch -D)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Destructive git command blocked. Confirm explicitly with the user and run from the terminal if intended."}}'; fi

fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$fp" | grep -qE '(\.env($|\.)|credentials\.json)' && ! echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.(example|sample|template)$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env and credentials.json files are blocked from agent access. Secrets must not enter agent context. .env.example/.sample/.template are allowed."}}'; fi

fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$fp" | grep -qE '(AGENTS\.md|developer-rules\.md|CLAUDE\.md)$'; then printf '{"systemMessage":"Agent is modifying its own constraints file (%s). Review the diff carefully before approving."}' "$fp"; fi
